title: Kilned Burning Hearth: dedicated curation proof pass open
body: Mode: dedicated-knowledge-curation. Active claims and live commit queue were empty before opening; baseline fitness is SOFT with 0 hard and 0 critical. Intended boundary: verify current ready-empty drainable buffers, write a curator-pass proof report, preserve substance, and avoid comms retention deletion while the agent-collaboration-research owner gate remains in force.
